design_strategy: The Performance Pro archetype. Tactical, High-Contrast, Nightshift optimized.
audience_considerations: AMEs (Aircraft Maintenance Engineers), hangar/nightshift work, phone in pocket, dirty hands/gloves. Focus on speed, legibility, and large touch targets.

typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all screen titles, numbers, and key data points (rugged, clear). Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular logs and form labels (technical, highly legible).

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0E17] shadow-2xl border-x border-[#374151]
layout.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar (h-16 to h-20) with safe area padding. Use Lucide icons.
layout.touch_targets: CRITICAL: h-14 (56px) minimum for all buttons and inputs to accommodate gloves and dirty hands.
layout.spacing: p-4 or p-6 container padding. Use generous gaps between form fields (gap-6).

screens.Onboarding: Full screen image background (monochrome turbine) with dark gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0E17] via-[#0A0E17]/80 to-transparent`). Big 'T-1 AERO' title. Disclaimer text. 'Accept & Continue' massive primary button.
screens.Home: Header: 'T-1 AERO'. Top section: Total Hours (North Star Metric). Action grid: 'New Entry', 'Repeat Last' (Massive buttons). Recent Entries list below.
screens.Log_Entry: Scrollable form. Large h-14 inputs. Use Shadcn Drawer (bottom sheet) for ATA Chapter and Aircraft Registry selection to mimic native iOS/Android pickers. Sticky bottom 'Save Entry' button. Photo attachment area.
screens.Stats: Tabs for (Type, ATA, Capacity). Big bold metric at top-left. Bar charts (Recharts) showing hours. High contrast grid lines.
screens.Credentials: Cards showing license types. Use colored left borders (green/amber/red) to indicate expiry status. Expiry countdown in days.
screens.Settings: List of options: Export to PDF/CSV, Dark Mode toggle, Disclaimers, Bulk Entry. Each row h-14.

components.drawer: Use Vaul/Shadcn Drawer for all complex selects to avoid modal popups on mobile. This gives a native feel.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px border border-white/10. No drop shadows. Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-xl).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Active states scale down to 0.95. High contrast text.
components.inputs: bg-[#0A0E17] border-[#374151] rounded-xl text-white px-4 h-14 text-lg. Floating labels or uppercase overlines.

images.usage: Empty state background or Stats header

instructions_to_main_agent: Simulate a native mobile app layout: use a main wrapper with `max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0E17]`.
Build standard React JS web app, NOT React Native. The environment is web.
Implement bottom navigation with 5 tabs (Home, Entries, Stats, Credentials, Settings) using lucide-react icons.
Do NOT use standard HTML `<select>`. Use Shadcn Drawer for native-like bottom sheet pickers.
Ensure all buttons and inputs have `min-h-[56px]` to comply with the 'dirty hands / gloves' requirement.
Add `data-testid` to all form inputs, buttons, and list items.
Use sonner for success/error toasts (e.g., 'Entry saved in 4s').
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Never use generic centered layouts. Use dark mode exclusively. Create depth through 1px borders, not soft shadows. Add micro-animations for touch feedback (`active:scale-95`). No emoji icons. Maintain aviation/technical aesthetic.
